problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
